title: Diffraction Grating 3D
description: A 3D render of a holographic diffraction grating — micro-grooves split reflected light into spectral orders via the grating equation, throwing the shifting rainbow sheen of a CD, hologram, or diffraction foil. Linear, radial, or spiral grooves on a disc, torus-knot, or sphere; orbit with the mouse. Grating type, pitch, and shape are randomized each load and mappable to audio.
